final_prompt.prompt:
Generate a monochrome logo design.

Style/medium: flat vector, purely flat, clean crisp edges
Composition:
  five abstracted sweeping forms (dynamic arrows or chevrons) in synchronized motion
  overlapping intersections create a complex kinetic geometric pattern
  all forms converge at a single point
Subject: abstract logo mark symbolizing unified purpose and forward momentum
Scene/backdrop:
Lighting/mood:
Color palette: solid black and white only
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim): no text
Constraints: no gradients, no shading, no text
Avoid: literal arrows or simple lines; decorative fills; grey tones
